name: jarvis-prototype
description: Jarvis Desktop assistant with local automation, packaged UI, and auto-update support.
author: JYH

scripts.package:dir: npm run build:desktop-ui && node scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --dir --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:desktop-ui && node scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --mac dmg zip --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:desktop-ui && node scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --win nsis --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:desktop-ui && node scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --linux AppImage deb --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.release: npm run build:desktop-ui && node scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --publish always --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.check: node --check electron-builder.config.cjs && node --check scripts/build-desktop-ui.cjs && node --check scripts/doctor-macos-signing.cjs && node --check scripts/notarize-macos.cjs && node --check scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs && node --check src/main/main.cjs && node --check src/main/assistant-service.cjs && node --check src/main/platform-adapters.cjs && node --check src/main/ollama-service.cjs && node --check src/main/tts-service.cjs && node --check src/main/credential-store.cjs && node --check src/main/settings-store.cjs && node --check src/main/screen-service.cjs && node --check src/main/browser-service.cjs && node --check src/main/desktop-ui-server.cjs && node --check src/main/updater-service.cjs && node --check src/main/obs-service.cjs && node --check src/main/file-service.cjs && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js && node --check src/renderer/popup.js
